name: Beignets
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except oil and powdered sugar.
2. Knead the dough and let it rise until doubled in size.
3. Punch down the dough.
4. Roll into a rectangle.
5. Cut the dough into 2-inch wide strips at a diagonal.
6. Cut each strip diagonally to form diamonds.
7. Place the diamonds on ungreased baking sheets, about 2 inches apart.
8. Cover loosely with plastic wrap and let the scraps rest for 15 minutes.
9. Roll and cut the remaining dough as before.
10. Let the dough rise until doubled in bulk, about 45 minutes.
11. Heat oil in a large saucepan to 365°F or until a 1-inch cube of bread browns in 60 seconds.
12. Carefully slide beignets into hot oil, 3-4 at a time. Do not crowd the pan.
13. Fry for 2-3 minutes per side, turning once with tongs.
14. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
15. Sift powdered sugar over the hot beignets and serve immediately.
